links.source_location: manifest and service worker both referenced by the HTML shell for PWA support
line 36 - destructures sessionId, setMessages, openCostDashboard, setActiveAgent
line 45 - App handles PWA ?costs shortcut to openCostDashboard via store
Both render agent identity (icon + accentColor) pulled from AGENTS data
ErrorBubble is an alternative rendering path; MessageBubble handles agent===error inline but ErrorBubble is standalone fallback
Both use Plotly for visualisation; MessageBubble renders inline chart fences, CostDashboard renders cost charts
Both show persona-organised quick-action buttons; EmptyState shown before first message, QuickStartPanel shown mid-conversation
PersonaCard in EmptyState and PersonaSection inside QuickStartPanel solve the same UI problem — collapsible persona-keyed action grid
CommandPalette also surfaces quick actions as sendable items; both ultimately call sendMessage
Both are loading-state placeholders displayed while agent is working
line 6 - reads serviceHealth, openCostDashboard, openCommandPalette, toggleMobileSidebar
Both read serviceHealth from useStore; ServicePanel writes it, Header reads top-3 dots
MobileDrawer embeds Sidebar as its agent selector section (line 37)
Both render service health links — MobileDrawer renders compact grid, ServicePanel renders tiered list
line 19 - fetches health every 5 min and writes setServiceHealth
